tasks.label: Verify Vite build via cmd
tasks.command: cmd.exe /c cd /d d:\myCV\Cv ^&^& npm run build

tasks.label: Verify Vite build via powershell bypass
Verify Vite build with policy bypass
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass; Set-Location 'd:\myCV\Cv'; npm run build
